case_title: SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL VS. HERTSEL REIHANIAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $560.00 FILED BY SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT REIHANIAN, HERTSEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-10-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-19-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. SINAL MEMORIAL CHAPEL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAVID SHINER, ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE.
